---
title: "test_pennyone_structural_rectification.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_structural_rectification.ts"
loc: 21
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.80
style_score: 8.93
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 9.03
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [registry](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `neuralGraphPath`
- `content`
